name: s-e-r-a
description: S.E.R.A. clean-core: secure local runtime, evidence artifacts, modular agent foundation.

scripts.hygiene: npm run hygiene:source && npm run hygiene:runtime
scripts.certify: npm run build && npm test && node packages/certs/dist/certify.js
scripts.phase16:verify: npm run knowledge:verify && npm run phase16:demo
scripts.verify: npm run hygiene && npm run free-core:verify && npm run knowledge:verify && npm run build && npm test && npm run certify
scripts.phase17:verify: npm run knowledge:verify && npm run phase17:demo
scripts.phase18:verify: npm run free-core:verify && npm run knowledge:verify && npm run phase18:demo
